name: Sugar Diamonds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg yolk and vanilla; mix well to combine.
3. Sift together the flour, cinnamon, and salt into another bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring gently until just combined.
5. Spoon the dough into a greased 15 x 10 x 1-inch (inches) baking pan.
6. Cover the dough with plastic wrap and press it evenly into the pan.
7. Remove the plastic wrap.
8. In another mixing bowl, beat the egg white until foamy.
9. Brush the beaten egg white over the dough.
10. Sprinkle the pecans evenly over the top of the dough.
11. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
12. Cut into 1-1/2-inch (inches) diamond shapes while the cake is still warm.
Yield: about 6 dozen.
